name: Cronograma Creator Agent Skills
description: Skills that AI agents can perform with Cronograma Creator. The primary skill (create_timeline) uses a single public HTTP POST and requires no browser. The remaining skills are browser-side and require running the app (e.g. via Playwright).

skills.name: create_timeline
skills.title: Create a publicly-shareable Gantt timeline
skills.description: Builds a cronograma from a state object and stores it server-side. Returns a short URL the user can open in any browser to see the timeline. No authentication required.

title.description: Optional title. Defaults to state.title or 'Cronograma'.

url.description: Full public URL the user can open

errors.429: rate limit: 30 shares per IP per hour

skills.lifetime: Anonymous shares expire 90 days after creation.

skills.name: create_timeline_get
skills.title: Create a short URL via GET (fallback for agents that cannot POST)
skills.description: Same as create_timeline but reachable via a single GET request. Designed for agent runtimes that can only fetch URLs (e.g. some ChatGPT plugin-like environments). The agent must return the resulting URL to the user as plain text, never as an HTML link or attachment.

s.description: Encoded state. By default base64url-encoded UTF-8 JSON. Use '-' and '_' instead of '+' and '/'; padding '=' is optional.

title.description: URL-encoded title. Defaults to state.title or 'Cronograma'.

format.description: 'text' returns the share URL as plain text (recommended for agents). 'json' returns { id, url }.

encoding.description: Use gzip-base64url for large states to fit under the CDN URL limit (~16-32 KB).

oneOf.description: format=text returns the URL as plain text with a trailing newline.

errors.400: missing 's', invalid encoding/format, invalid base64url/UTF-8/JSON, or invalid state
errors.414: Cloudflare returns 414 when the GET URL exceeds its limit (~16-32 KB). Use encoding=gzip-base64url or POST.
errors.429: rate limit: 30 shares per IP per hour

skills.lifetime: Anonymous shares expire 90 days after creation.
skills.agentNotes: Always pass format=text. Pipe the response body verbatim to the user as the final answer. Never wrap it in Markdown links, HTML, or downloadable files.

skills.name: validate_timeline_state
skills.title: Validate a cronograma state before submitting
skills.description: Runs the same validation the app performs, returning a list of errors. Available only when the app is open in a browser (Playwright/Puppeteer or headless).

skills.name: export_share_url
skills.title: Get a stateless share URL (legacy hash form)
skills.description: Encodes the current state into the URL hash. Works fully offline but produces long URLs for non-trivial cronogramas. Prefer create_timeline for short URLs.

skills.name: export_png
skills.title: Render the current cronograma as a PNG image
skills.description: Returns the rendered Gantt chart as a base64 data URL. Useful for embedding in chat replies, sending as an image attachment, or saving locally.

output.description: PNG image as base64 data URL (data:image/png;base64,...)

skills.alternativeAutoexport: Append ?autoexport=image to the URL to trigger this on page load. Result is also placed in #autoexport-result.

skills.name: export_json
skills.title: Read the current cronograma state as JSON
skills.description: Returns the full state object for the cronograma currently rendered. Useful for round-tripping, archiving, or further editing.
skills.alternativeAutoexport: Append ?autoexport=json to the URL to trigger this on page load. Result placed in #autoexport-result.

skills.name: load_timeline
skills.title: Load a cronograma into an open browser page
skills.description: Applies a state object to the currently-open app (replacing whatever is on screen). Useful for headless flows where the agent constructs a state and wants to display/screenshot it.

skills.name: self_test
skills.title: Run the in-app self-test
skills.description: Verifies the browser API methods are responding correctly. Useful as a smoke test before running a headless workflow.

agentModeFlags.?mode=agent: Disables confirms, animations, and non-essential UI. Console logs prefixed [CronogramaAI].
agentModeFlags.?autoexport=url|image|json: Auto-runs the corresponding export on page load and writes result JSON to #autoexport-result.
